mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO show_seats (show_id, seat_row, seat_col, seat_label, status, locked_by_user_id, locked_until) VALUES
(#{seat.showId}, #{seat.seatRow}, #{seat.seatCol}, #{seat.seatLabel}, #{seat.status}, #{seat.lockedByUserId}, #{seat.lockedUntil})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM show_seats WHERE show_id = #{showId} ORDER BY seat_row, seat_col

SELECT * FROM show_seats WHERE id IN
#{id}
